basics.name: Dmitrii Andreevich Kovalkov
basics.label: Infrastructure Solutions Architect
basics.summary: Experienced infrastructure solutions architect with **{{experienceYears}} years of expertise** in designing and delivering high-load, fault-tolerant systems.
basics.specialization: Kubernetes (Deckhouse Platform), cloud platforms (AWS, Yandex Cloud), automation (Terraform, Ansible, Python), PCI DSS compliance.
highlights: Hands-on experience across the full product lifecycle — from pilots to rollout and infrastructure optimization. Focused on building scalable, secure solutions that drive business outcomes.

highlights.text: Working with customers to adopt Deckhouse products into their IT landscape

highlights: Running Deckhouse Kubernetes Platform pilot projects
Gathering requirements and collaborating with engineering teams on product improvements
work.companyDescription: Systems integration, enterprise process automation, and IT consulting

highlights: Deploying and operating the Deckhouse Kubernetes Platform
Developing and maintaining application backend services
Writing production software
Supporting AWS-based infrastructure (EC2 instances, managed databases, Kubernetes)
Writing automation scripts (Python, Bash)
Using Chef and Ansible
Managing infrastructure as code with Terraform
Supporting TeamCity CI/CD
Performing recurring work in line with PCI DSS procedures

highlights.text: Operating a heterogeneous infrastructure (Linux/Windows VMs, VMware hypervisors, networking) compliant with the PCI DSS standard

highlights: Working within an ITSM methodology
Receiving and registering customer tickets; preparing change bulletins for infrastructure updates
Operating an ELK-based logging stack and Zabbix/VictoriaMetrics monitoring
Provisioning baseline infrastructure: Nginx, Apache2, IIS, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MS SQL, PHP, Node.js
Automation stack: SaltStack
Proactive monitoring and infrastructure optimization
Performing periodic software updates and vulnerability remediation per PCI DSS
Providing technical support for company services
Writing departmental runbooks and procedures
Hiring and training team members

highlights.text: Contributing to company projects (billing system, FASTPANEL) as a tester and requirements owner

highlights: External customer communications, handling complaints and escalations
Providing technical support to customers
Helping customers with dedicated physical servers and OpenVZ/KVM VPS
Supporting ISPManager and FASTPANEL control panels
Configuring Apache2, Nginx, MySQL, and PHP for customer websites
Diagnosing server issues and identifying root causes
